title: Backpack Club
description: Purely server-side or singleplayer. Equipable, dyeable, upgradable, craftable, enchantable, placeable, repairable, protective backpacks.
body:
[![CurseForge](https://i.imgur.com/eBmLp7F.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/mjramon) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/FMq4hOj.png)](https://modrinth.com/organization/aegis-architectum) [![Discord](https://i.imgur.com/v0q5sfn.png)](https://discord.gg/fWW4Atmr69)

![Backpack Club](https://i.imgur.com/sSZ2BNs.png)


_Purely server-side or singleplayer.\
Equipable, dyeable, upgradable, craftable, enchantable, placeable, repairable, protective backpacks._


![All-In-One](https://i.imgur.com/tAccPfT.png)

## FEATURES
- Craftable, tiered backpacks: each new tier has more space and protection.
- Wearable in chest slot. Every backpack tier has own custom model.
- Each tier has same protection as corresponding chestplate - and even higher!
- Dragon backpack acts like Elytra as well.
- When upgraded to a higher tier in Smithing Table, your new backpack keeps all properties, items and enchantments.
- Can be placed on ground and interacted with as a block: works with hoppers, pipes, droppers etc.
- Can be opened from hand.
- Can be dyed.
- Can be enchanted.
- Can be repaired with corresponding material.
- No overrides: should work with other mods and datapacks.


![Make it your own](https://i.imgur.com/aaIiiLC.png)

## TECH DETAILS
- Adjusted for skin overlay layer offset.
- Fully translatable.
- Tagged as "minecraft:chest_armor", "backpackclub:backpacks" and "c:backpacks".
- Separate creative tab.
- Clean approach: no console errors.
- Everything is data-driven.


## BACKPACKS PREVIEW

<summary>Show backpacks list</summary>

![Backpacks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ET9mun4Y/images/d2d7f3c96f524f2603916753e47c6adda9e025cf.png)

## REQUIREMENTS (server side / singleplayer)
- [Polymer](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymer)
- [Filament](https://modrinth.com/mod/filament)
- Enable "AutoHost" in Polymer config. [See how to](https://polymer.pb4.eu/latest/user/resource-pack-hosting/).


## RECIPES
![Backpack Club Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ET9mun4Y/images/5465ebc81d4dd9f1eba67b91acb509b73771e35a.png)

<details>
<summary>Backpack Recipes Transcription</summary>
  
### Humble Backpack
- Crafting Table

```
- - -
L C L
- - -
```

**L**: Leather\
**C**: Chest


### Sturdy Backpack
- Crafting Table

```
L L L
L C L
L L L
```

**L**: Leather\
**C**: Chest


### Reinforced Backpack
- Smithing Table

Sturdy Backpack + Block of Iron\
Smithing Template: *None*


### Gilded Backpack
- Smithing Table

Reinforced Backpack + Block of Gold\
Smithing Template: *None*


### Inlaid Backpack
- Smithing Table

Gilded Backpack + Block of Diamond\
Smithing Template: *None*


### Blazed Backpack
- Smithing Table

Inlaid Backpack + Netherite Ingot\
Smithing Template: *Netherite Upgrade*


### Withered Backpack
- Smithing Table

Blazed Backpack + Nether Star\
Smithing Template: *Netherite Upgrade*


### Dragon Backpack
- Smithing Table

Withered Backpack + Elytra\
Smithing Template: *Netherite Upgrade*
</details>


## RECOMMENDATIONS
- [Simple Datapacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-datapacks)
